title: Test coverage for `pkg/bindings/internal/util`
body:
**Area:** `pkg/bindings/internal/util`

**Gap:** `ToParams` (plus `Changed`, `IsSimpleType`, `SimpleTypeToParam`) is the
reflection-based helper that turns every binding's options struct into URL query
parameters — used across all of `pkg/bindings`. It has **no unit tests**, despite
non-trivial rules:
- only "changed" (non-nil pointer) fields are emitted;
- field names are lowercased, `schema:"name"` renames a param, `schema:"-"` skips it;
- simple types / `fmt.Stringer` → a single value, slices → repeated values,
  maps → a JSON string;
- a slice of non-simple types is an error.

**Proposal:** add table-driven unit tests pinning this behavior. Pure-Go, no
behavior change, high blast radius (everything depends on `ToParams`).

comments.body: the api design here is really clean. training loops feel way less boilerplate-y than other frameworks
